message:
🌱 Add vitess: Make emergency reparents more robust. mission (#900)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vitess-6206-make-emergency-reparents-more-robust",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vitess: Make emergency reparents more robust.",
+    "description": "Make emergency reparents more robust.. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vitess deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your vtctldclient --version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nhelm list -n vitess 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working vitess installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vitess configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant vitess configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl get configmap -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=vitess\n```\nWe previously did a lot of work to make TabletExternallyReparented and PlannedReparentShard more robust (#5151, #5172, #5391). We plan to do the same for EmergencyReparentShard (ERS) next."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Make emergency reparents more robust.",
+        "description": "This PR:\n1. Adds fields to the `SlaveStatus` struct to pull in the `RelayLogPosition` which maps to the retrieved GTIDSet in the MySQL case.\n2. Adds `FilePosition` and `FileRelayLogPosition` fields for all flavors as a fall back.\n3. Adds `MasterServerId` field. We will need to retrieve this for finding errant GTIDs in next PR.\n4. Adds `Comparable` method and `AllPositionsComparable` function to determine if a list of positions are all comparable with another list of positions.\n\nRelated Issue:\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl get events -n vitess --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Make emergency reparents more robust.\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR:\n1. Adds fields to the `SlaveStatus` struct to pull in the `RelayLogPosition` which maps to the retrieved GTIDSet in the MySQL case.\n2. Adds `FilePosition` and `FileRelayLogPosition` fields for all flavors as a fall back.\n3. Adds `MasterServerId` field. We will need to retrieve this for finding errant GTIDs in next PR.\n4.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },

+      "feature"
